title: On the Inside of a Military Dictatorship
original_title: On the Inside of a Military Dictatorship
overview: The entire world praised the military and Aung San Suu Kyi, when power was passed on to the democracy icon after 50 years of military dictatorship. One year later she defended an ethnic cleansing and had isolated herself from the public. This film tells you why.
